metadata.title: OpenCompliance Medium Corridor Catalog
metadata.remarks: Synthetic public-safe control catalog for the ExampleCo medium corridor. This is OpenCompliance seed content, not framework text.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Administrative identities require MFA and conditional access in the scoped production environment.

controls.title: Typed periodic access review export present

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: A typed export of periodic access review evidence is present for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Access review closure and high-risk exception resolution are attested for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Audit logging is enabled with a declared retention window for the scoped production runtime.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Encryption at rest is enabled for the scoped customer data stores and no unencrypted store is present.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Scoped runtime service accounts do not use user-managed long-lived keys.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The scoped workload runs only in the declared approved regions.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Backup snapshots are scheduled with a declared immutable retention window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Security awareness completion is documented for the current review period.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: A restore exercise is documented inside the declared review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The processor register is current and DPA coverage is declared for the reviewed subprocessors.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The DSR runbook is approved and has a named owner for the current review window.

controls.title: Privacy by design adequacy review boundary

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Privacy-by-design adequacy has been demonstrated for the full product change process.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Default branch protections are enforced for the scoped production repository.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: CI workflow policy constrains deployment to reviewed workflows and protected refs.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The production change-review policy is approved and declares an emergency change path for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The incident response runbook is approved, owned, and current for the declared review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Incident escalation contacts and notification paths are current for the declared review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: High-risk vendor agreements carry the required security and privacy terms for the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Vendor tiering, review cadence, and inherited-control allocation are adequate for the in-scope dependency set.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Production change control decomposes into machine policy checks plus signed governance evidence.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Public ingress is HTTPS-only with managed certificates and TLS 1.2 or higher.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: The managed network boundary is attached to the declared ingress path for scoped public services.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Administrative ingress is restricted to approved source ranges at the managed network boundary.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Plaintext transport is disabled on the scoped public ingress path.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Configuration exceptions are current, owned, and not already expired in the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Patch exceptions declare compensating controls and no declared exception is already expired in the current review window.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Patch cadence and exception thresholds are adequate for the in-scope production assets.
